parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🧪 *Test Failed:* ' + $node['Execute Playwright'].json.filename + '
📊 *Stats:* ' + $node['Execute Playwright'].json.stats.passed + '/' + $node['Execute Playwright'].json.stats.total + ' passed

🤖 *AI RCA:*
' + ($json.gemini_res?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || 'AI Analysis currently unavailable.') }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔴 Failure Report: ' + $node['Execute Playwright'].json.filename }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

AI Analysis

' + ($node['AI Analysis (Gemini)'].json.gemini_res?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || 'No AI analysis available') + '

Logs

' + $node['Execute Playwright'].json.errorLogs + '
' }}
